description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a deep charcoal or dark gray fabric upholstery. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be well-padded and uniform in size. The armrests are broad, rounded, and padded, extending slightly outward from the seat for added comfort. The backrest is straight and continuous, providing full support across the width of the sofa. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and substantial appearance. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, dark gray three-seater sofa with smooth upholstery, broad padded armrests, and three uniform seat and back cushions. The design is minimalist with a solid base and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, broad padded armrests, and the smooth, solid base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the backrest and armrest, and the sofa's solid, legless base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uninterrupted solid base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest profile and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and evenly spaced across the sofa.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rounded, and padded armrests at each end, extending slightly outward and matching the height of the seat cushions.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is solid and extends to the floor, giving a grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions providing full-width support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
